# The Growth Marketing Platform Migration Guide - Iterable

## The Growth Marketing Platform Migration Guide

The platform migration. Traditionally, it’s a time-consuming, resource-heavy process rife with obstacles. And if you’re not adequately prepared, you can be left scrambling to find value in the process.

In this guide, you will see exactly what it takes to prepare yourself and your team for what lies ahead when migrating growth marketing platforms.

We show you how to get started tidying up your current system in order to achieve immediate success on your new platform.

Download this migration guide to learn:

*   How your messaging strategy impacts your project timeline
*   What it takes to clean up your data for a painless integration process
*   Which obstacles to a smooth technical integration you need to address before getting started
